name: 收割
description: （被动）造成伤害时，对自己造成伤害量50%的治疗
skillCode: if (!context.sourcePiece || !context.rulePiece) return { success: false }; if (context.sourcePiece.instanceId !== context.rulePiece.instanceId) return { success: false }; if (!context.damage || context.damage <= 0) return { success: false }; const healAmount = Math.floor(context.damage * 0.5); if (healAmount <= 0) return { success: false }; const healResult = healDamage(context.rulePiece, context.rulePiece, healAmount, battle, 'reap'); return { success: true, message: context.rulePiece.name + '通过收割恢复了' + healResult.heal + '点生命值' };
